content: What would be my current best story progression team?
For the time being, just use Jenkins, Thais, Aigis, Leigh
You cannot clear all of the Story Mode with it, but you could realistically reach about Chapter 5 of Arc 1 in Normal Mode at the very least
Can use it as a filler Team for the time being

What exactly is the flaw of the team that can’t clear past chapter 5?
Too much damage on those levels ? Sustain?
Lack of Damage

I see , so games caps u hard mhm.
Only way is to pull vortice then and build a team around her ?
Most realistic approach atm
Not exactly hard cap, but the investment required is way more than just pulling Vortice
There's a Guide for Vortice in Arc 1 by Dadbak
Lemme find it rq
Got it , what would be a team for her with my current units?
Good to now before I wasted more pulls in Moon guide sigh
Celeste Thais Sanga/Caecus
With Vort
There's one for that too, if you wind up going for it

All right, time to do some reading .
Thank you everyone
Yh np man and hf

Just finished my first level 60 team! <:happy:1356053849894420683> (almost skill 3 on everyone, but still time gated on mats... mono realm problems <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>)

- Any suggestions on who to start raising next?  e.g. maybe Ramona, and then...??? <:Ramona_love:1459077541829546007>  would y'all recommend building teams one realm at a time?

- With E0 Vort as my main carry, how high should I aim to level her skills?  eventually lvl 6 her Exalt/Pursuit/??? skills? (currently gated at 4 by keeper level)
best vortice team i could make?
also have sanga

You could probably hack together a poison team for D-tide, so like Nymph Agrippa Ramona Faint or whatever

No reason to build 1 realm at a time (maybe exception for Gmurphy)

Pursuit is most important for Vortice, for sure get it to 6
Celeste Thais Sanga/Caecus
Wrong person oops, I meant <@145731220368654336>
which tawil team does the most dmg ive been rocking with blue tawil atm
do you think trying to get murphy from moonless is worth it or is it not that big of an upgrade
It's a nice upgrade yes, but good luck fishing for the 1 in 4 lol
LOL swiped a yolo 5 XD who should i replace for murphy?
What in the flying fuck
insane luck LMAO
Ok then replace the defensive slot (so Sanga/Caecus)
Thanks for the help 👍
As a newbie with E1 Vortice, probably better to pull on Moonless guide than trying for E3 Kath right?
You could always get 1 Kath and slowly dupe her
I'd wait for the final verdict on the upcoming Banner to replace Vortice
You have plenty of time before Moonless Guide + Kath (in Triple Rerun) disappears
To decide
Both excellent points. Yea probably best to wait a few days and then if nothing good roll for Kath into Moonless
Yeah, go for it
Sounds like a solid plan
hmm, hadn't considered a poison team - thanks for the suggestion! <:Ramona_love:1459077541829546007>
hi need help, i bought the new player thing where I can choose 1 standard chara, who should i get? this is my current team rn
You're not gonna like the answer haha
Save for now until you know who you need

i eventually want to build a Xu team and a mouchette team. So this standard chara for me is just temporary so my team can handle itself while waiting so i dont mind ifthey eventually get moved ut of theroster
Would be nice to get a solid survive chara if possible
The general advice for these are that if you face no issues clearing, you shouldn't use it
Because likely at some point in tkme when you branch into the end game mode, you'll need different units from other realms
That's when you actually use the proto paradise
You shouldn't face major issues witj this team until ch5
Would personally reccomend pulling blue
Oh okay, I just dont know if my survive kit is enough since it dont have counters and death resist
Chaos units give 100 dr anw
But that's not the main point
Click your tentacles in game

You should see 3 stances.

Blue
White
Red
White is shield
yeah but i dont switch until i build them up
You can either increase number of tentacles with blue
Or just constant shield with white
alright thanks! I rarely switch cause games end too fast for the tentacles to build up wnd that i thought the shield given is not enough anyway, how does the shield scale in the tentacles
Health and realm mastery
It's some shield which slowly adds up over a long battle especially for poison base teams
Where you're relying on poison application
Imagine 50 shield per turn over 6 turns. That's 300 hp saved
thanks! I’ll save the proto just like you suggested, so hard not to xD the dopamine when getting a new chara is too good
Have you seen this yet
+guides

but thank you! i’ll save it for when i need it
All good
Btw end game youll need 19 characters
ahh damnn crazy, thanks!

yus, kath dont really have arith issues, so winkle aint giving her much
plus arc1 tend to give you debuffs, which you can cleanse with her 2 cost

Alright, so I suppose it's time to replace Winkle for tinct, ogier is already there for the shield anyway if needed, so at most I just lose counter from Winkle, which I feel doesn't matter because the team doesn't rely on it
mju, you can eventually replace ogier by winkle in the stages where the boss has like
50 barriers
(chapter 9)
